notes:
It installed EAC and a loading bar appeared, but even when it showed full loading, still nothing happend. I had like 5 of those windows in my activity list, very weird. Never got passed it though.
Also didn't try any launching commands, as I don't know any, nor do I know where to find them.

This is my first report on this game, but it's not the first time I tried to run this game on Linux.
First time I tried, it was on different hardware and a different distro (Arch at the time), Manjaro now, and back then I managed to launch the game, but couldn't get online to work.
title: Blazing Sails
